seoTitle: St Mary vs St Ruth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Mary and St Ruth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Mary vs St Ruth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Mary and St Ruth.
heading: St Mary vs St Ruth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Mary, Queensland and St Ruth, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Ruth has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to St Mary (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Mary or St Ruth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Mary has a flood risk score of 56/100, while St Ruth scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Mary scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. St Ruth scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Mary or St Ruth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Ruth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
